resources.string: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
⚠️ Restricted �?may be killed by system, tap to unrestrict
Disabled �?some features (e.g. notification listening) need this permission, tap to enable
Data migrated to external directory. Uninstalling the app will not lose data.
Data is stored in the app\'s internal directory. Uninstalling will lose all data (configs, chat history, memories). Authorize an external storage directory is recommended.
Copy all data from internal storage to external storage directory. Do not close the app during migration.\n\nOriginal files in internal storage will not be deleted.
After disabling, new data will be written to internal storage. Existing data in external storage will not be deleted.\n\n⚠️ Data produced after disabling will still be lost on uninstall.
允许 Hippy 智能体感知屏幕内容并操控手机界面，实现自动化任务执行。此服务不会收集或上传任何个人数据
Microphone permission required for voice input
Microphone permission denied. Please enable it in system settings.
Camera permission required to take photos
No models available. Please configure in Settings �?Model Provider
Agent requests to use the following features. Allow?
Agent requests to execute the following command:
No skills available for this agent
Agent thinking, you can still type...
Agent requests to perform accessibility actions. Allow?
Session not initialized, please retry later
Current model does not support image understanding, image will be sent as text
📘 Group has "@mention only" enabled, @ the agent to send a message
Agent not found: %1$s, please check agent configuration
No model configured, please configure a model in Settings
Model request failed, max retries reached. Please check model config or switch models
No permission to access this model, please check API key permissions
Model does not exist or has been deprecated, please check model name
Too many requests, please retry later
Model request parameter error, please check model configuration
Model service gateway error, please retry later
Model service temporarily unavailable, please retry later
Network connection failed, please check network settings
Streaming connection failed, please check network or model service
Failed to process message, please retry later
I noticed you interrupted the task. Is there anything to add?
🆔 Context compressing... 📑 Tokens: %1$s / %2$s (%3$d%%) 💰 %4$d messages, compressing %5$d + keeping %6$d
🆔 Context compression complete 📑 Tokens: %1$s -> %2$s / %3$s (%4$d%%) Saved %5$s 💰 %6$d messages compressed
Task cannot be resumed after interruption
All agents disabled. Please enable one first.
Create new conversation from bottom bar
Delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be undone.
When enabled, only receive messages that mention you, not broadcasts
Select the LLM model for speakers when broadcasting
Dissolve group \"%1$s\"?\nAll chat history will be preserved, but the group will be deleted.
Not initialized. Chat with this agent first to complete initialization.
Inactive conversation timeout and other UI preferences
Common rules applied to all agents
Check installation status of common environments
Manage \"Don\'t ask again\" rules for tool approvals
Manage system event hooks and quiet hours
Not set (used when primary model fails)
Select skills to enable on agent startup
Select tools the agent can use
When disabled, this agent won\'t run in the background
No skills available to load or update from skill pool
Delete agent \"%1$s\"?\n\nNote: The agent\'s workspace data folder will not be deleted, only the configuration is removed. This action cannot be undone.
Delete %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
Please install skills in the skill pool first
Skill Store requires Linux environment and Node.js. Please initialize first.
This skill has not passed security review. Confirm the source is trusted before installing.
Start a new conversation with an agent
Previous HippyAgent data detected on this device. Choose how to handle it:
Discard historical data, keep current workspace content
Merge historical data into current workspace, newer files take precedence
Overwrite current workspace with historical data
Configure message push channels for the agent. Supports Webhook push and bidirectional communication.
Send messages via Feishu bot, supports QR auto-configuration
Send messages via DingTalk bot, supports QR auto-configuration
Send messages via WeCom bot, supports QR auto-configuration
Send and receive messages via WeChat iLink Bot, supports QR login
Send and receive messages via QQ Bot Official API
Send and receive messages via Telegram Bot API
Tap to start QR binding for %1$s
Scan the QR code above with %1$s
QR code saved. Please scan from gallery in %1$s
%1$s not installed. Please scan with another device
Scanned. Please confirm login on your phone.
No memory data yet.\nAfter chatting with an agent, it will automatically extract key information from conversations.
Delete this memory? This action cannot be undone.
Your smart assistant runs AI Agents on your phone, automates tasks, and keeps all data locally for privacy.
Supports GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini and more. You can also connect to local LM Studio or llama.cpp.
Enable accessibility service, notification listener and other permissions so the Agent can operate your phone and respond to messages.
Create your first Agent or start from a preset template. You can revisit this guide anytime in Settings.
Already have an API Key? Configure now
Linux environment failed to start. Some features unavailable.
Agent requests permission to execute operation: %1$s%2$s
Send messages via Feishu bot, supports QR code auto-config
Send messages via DingTalk bot, supports QR code auto-config
Send messages via WeCom bot, supports QR code auto-config
Send/receive messages via WeChat iLink Bot, supports QR login
Send/receive messages via QQ Bot Official API
Send/receive messages via Telegram Bot API
Auto-obtained after QR login (can also be filled manually)
Some environments failed to install. You can install them manually later.
Make calls and read call logs
Agent will request permissions as needed. Pre-authorizing common permissions is recommended to avoid conversation interruptions.
No model providers, tap + to add
No models, tap + to add or fetch from server
Dream mode allows the Agent to automatically perform memory consolidation, knowledge reinforcement and other background tasks during idle time, similar to the human sleep process.
Allow Agent to perform maintenance tasks in background
Curator automatically extracts, merges, and optimizes skills from execution history during Dream, making the Agent smarter over time.
No auto-extracted skills yet. Skills will be generated automatically after Dream runs.
Tap + in the top right to add
Configure tool call approval policies to ensure sensitive operations require user confirmation.
Sensitive tool calls require user confirmation
When you select \"Always allow\" or \"Don\'t allow again\" during tool approval, rules will appear here
These rules are automatically matched during tool approval. Tap the delete icon to revoke a rule.
Are you sure you want to clear all security rules? All tool approvals will be re-asked after clearing.
This project is open source under the Apache 2.0 License
No API keys, tap + to add
Automatically compress lengthy memories, retain important info, remove redundant content, and improve memory retrieval efficiency.
Uses Android system TTS engine, no download needed
Install command executed successfully, but verification failed.
Tap + in the top right to add
Conversations not updated within this time will be collapsed. 0 disables collapsing.
Please enter a valid non-negative integer
Adjust font size across the app
Design is the implementation of interfaces, not the stacking of UIs.
Display avatar emoji next to agent messages in chat
Global rules are injected at the beginning of all agents\' system prompts and apply to all agents.
Agent can perceive and control the phone screen
Agent needs this enabled to control the phone
Tap the button below to go to system accessibility settings
Tap to enter and enable the service
Return to this page to confirm status
Banking/Payment apps are blocked by default
High-risk operations like entering passwords or payment amounts require user confirmation
All operations have audit logs for traceability
You can disable the service anytime in system settings
Manual confirmation required before tool execution
Only execute within specified time range
Tap + to create your first cron job
e.g. remind me at 3pm tomorrow to join a meeting
Describe when to run; the system auto-parses it into a cron expression
No notifications, results are logged only
Type above to see the parsed result
Parse failed; use manual input or refine the description
Multiple possible times detected, please pick one
Format: min hour day month dow, e.g. 0 15 * * * means daily 15:00
Tap + in the top right to add skill
Are you sure you want to delete %1$s?
ACP allows exposing agents as ACP endpoints, communicating with other systems via JSON-RPC. Supports interaction with other ACP-compatible systems (e.g. QwenPaw, Claude Code).
Allow external systems to access this agent via ACP protocol
Tap + in the bottom right to add ACP server
Agents can proactively respond to system events (SMS, calls, battery changes, etc.) for active perception. Corresponding permissions need to be granted after enabling.
Events won\'t trigger during quiet hours (except incoming calls)
📡 Network unavailable, message cached. Will auto-send when network recovers
⚠️ Request timed out, please try again later
⚠️ Invalid API key, please check model provider config
⚠️ Rate limited, please try again later
⚠️ Out of memory (OOM): Context too long. Please shorten the conversation or restart the app
⚠️ Iterations exhausted (%1$d rounds). Task not fully completed. Current progress:\n%2$s
(Agent was still calling tools in the last round, failed to generate text summary)
⚠️ Loop detected (repeated similar operations). Task auto-stopped. Please check task description or adjust agent config.
Tool %1$s parameter \'%2$s\' contains suspected evasion/obfuscation pattern: %3$s
Tool %1$s parameter \'%2$s\' contains suspected obfuscation indicator: %3$s
Tool %1$s attempts to access system critical path %2$s
Tool %1$s parameter \'%2$s\' contains path traversal sequence: %3$s
Tool %1$s attempts to access sensitive file type %2$s: %3$s
Tool %1$s requires permission %2$s but not granted
Tool %1$s attempts to access restricted directory %2$s
Tool %1$s attempts to access local address %2$s
Block Control of System Security Apps
Target package %1$s is blacklisted, control blocked
Input text may contain sensitive content like passwords/payments/deletion, requires user confirmation
Agent is typing into an input field, first use requires user confirmation
Agent is launching a third-party app
Compact context to reduce token usage
Context compacted. Current messages: %1$d, total characters: %2$d
Start mission mode, let Agent autonomously complete complex tasks
Proactive memory enabled, suggestions pushed after 30 min idle
No user messages in current session, cannot generate plan

Backup management commands:
- /backup create [name]: Create backup
- /backup list: List all backups
- /backup restore <ID>: Restore backup
- /backup delete <ID>: Delete backup
Email management, supports IMAP/SMTP send and receive
Channel message sending, proactively send one-way messages to sessions or channels
Read PDF file content and extract text
Read Word (.docx) file content and extract plain text
Read Excel (.xlsx) file content and extract table data
Read PowerPoint (.pptx) file content and extract slide text
Guidance assistant, search local docs for installation and configuration guides
Knowledge base index, search source code and doc paths by keyword
Generate images from text descriptions, supports multiple image generation models
Permission not configured, default deny: %1$s. Please set permissionChecker.
%1$s permission required. Please grant permission in the dialog and retry.
%1$s permission required. Please grant in the dialog.
%1$s permission required. Please grant permission in the dialog and retry.
%1$s permission required. Please grant in Settings and retry.
Note: Room database files must remain in internal storage (Android limitation). Configs, chat history, and memories can be stored in the external directory.

After disabling external storage, new data will be written to internal storage. Existing data in external storage will not be deleted.\n\nWarning: Data produced after disabling will still be lost on uninstall.
JavaScript runtime + package executor, required by skill store and some tools (v22+)
Python runtime, required by code execution and script tools
Version control, required by repository operations and skill installation
Android native web access, OkHttp lightweight HTTP + WebView JS rendering auto-fallback
Linux terminal HTTP client, only available in Linux environment
Offline speech-to-text, supports Chinese/English/Japanese/Korean, long-press mic for voice input
Text-to-speech, uses Android system TTS engine

Install command executed successfully, but verification failed.
This is usually because the proot environment's PATH/link cache hasn't refreshed.

Suggested actions:
1. Restart the app and check again (most effective)
2. Run hash -r in terminal to refresh command cache

Verification details: %1$s
Historical data merged into current workspace
Current workspace overwritten with historical data
You are using a free model. Free models may use your data for training or analysis, posing an information leakage risk. Recommended for non-sensitive content only.
Data has been migrated to external directory. Uninstalling the app will not lose data.
Current data is stored in the app\'s internal directory. Uninstalling the app will lose all data (config, chat history, memory). It is recommended to authorize an external storage directory.
Scanned, please confirm on your phone
1. Enable ACP 2. Tap the button to start server 3. External systems connect via JSON-RPC to localhost:%1$s 4. Send requests to interact with the agent
Node.js installation failed. Go to Settings → Environment Check to install manually
Linux environment not initialized. The skill store needs Linux to execute search commands. Please complete initialization in Settings first
No GGUF file available for this model
Your on-device agent assistant, data fully local, privacy secure
Tell me your primary use case
Select an on-device AI model (can be changed later)
All data is stored locally by default and will not be uploaded to the cloud
